originalTitle: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
content: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.

originalTitle: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
title: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
content: Some 26 million people are "facing extreme hunger" in Kenya, Ethiopia and Somalia, warns humanitarian organisation Oxfam.

originalTitle: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
title: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: Eid without toys: Israeli restrictions drive up prices in Gaza
title: Eid without toys: Israeli restrictions drive up prices in Gaza
content: Amid war and supply restrictions, Gaza’s toy markets face shortages and high prices, leaving children without Eid gifts.

originalTitle: Flash flooding swamps Hawaii, prompting evacuation orders for 5,500 people
title: Flash flooding swamps Hawaii, prompting evacuation orders for 5,500 people
content: Oahu's emergency office has ordered residents in the Waialua area to 'leave now' amid risk of road failures.

originalTitle: Former FBI chief, Robert Mueller, dead at 81
title: Former FBI chief, Robert Mueller, dead at 81
content: Robert Mueller oversaw the probe into alleged Russian interference in the 2016 United States election.

originalTitle: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
content: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

originalTitle: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
content: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.

originalTitle: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
content: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.

originalTitle: 'If Liverpool play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'
title: 'If Liverpool play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'
content: Arne Slot needs answers quickly or Liverpool's unwanted records may no longer be his only worry.

originalTitle: Spurs v Forest - the 'disarray derby' key to survival hopes
title: Spurs v Forest - the 'disarray derby' key to survival hopes
content: Chaos clubs Tottenham Hotspur and Nottingham Forest are battling to survive in the Premier League - and face each other on Sunday.

originalTitle: 'Not just goals, he's a great connecter' - should Welbeck be in England squad?
title: 'Not just goals, he's a great connecter' - should Welbeck be in England squad?
content: Danny Welbeck scores two goals against Liverpool on Saturday to take his tally for the season to 12 - one day after he was left out of Thomas Tuchel's England squad.
